titles.title: A bill to improve handling of vacancies of the Director of National Intelligence, and for other purposes.
A bill to improve handling of vacancies of the Director of National Intelligence, and for other purposes.

action.text: Introduced in the Senate. Read the first time. Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under Read the First Time.

calendar.text: Read the second time. Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 450.
